name: Coach Club
about: Coach Club is a modern golf simulator venue offering year-round practice and play experiences across two locations in New Hampshire and Massachusetts. The facility blends traditional golf with advanced technology, featuring TrackMan simulators and professional coaching led by PGA professional and 2022 New England PGA Teacher of the Year Rico Riciputi. Memberships are available with options including family plans and benefits like annual coaching hours. The venue fosters a community-focused atmosphere with leagues, tournaments, and member events in a comfortable, well-appointed space that includes a lounge and putting green.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional coaching and instruction from a PGA Teacher of the Year
Advanced TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball data analysis
Community-focused environment with leagues and member events
Year-round golf opportunities regardless of weather
Limited memberships ensuring ample tee time availability

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, but BYOB may be allowed as no explicit restrictions are stated.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three 18ft wide bays equipped with TrackMan 4 launch monitors featuring dual radar and camera technology.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, as a dedicated golf facility, bringing your own clubs is recommended. Simulators can accommodate a variety of club types, and rental options may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No specific policy is mentioned regarding outside food and drink. The venue appears to focus on golf with no mention of on-site catering or bar services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Exact timing isn't specified, but TrackMan simulators typically allow for faster play than traditional golf, with 18 holes usually taking 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, family membership options are explicitly available, indicating the venue is designed to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels.
